chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2211 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 31.03.2026 Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Abdul Majeed Chandio B- Section Tando Adam. Admittedly, petition is pending only for the whereabouts of Ali Nawaz. Today, comments are filed by respondent No.8 that Ali Nawaz was an absconder in various crimes and has been arrested yesterday. Since the Ali Nawaz is no longer a missing person, the purpose of this petition stands served. Disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
